impact_analysis.description: Round 1 _run_provenance 헬퍼 created_at 주입으로 인해 TC-2 단언이 stale해진 것을 수정. packet 댓글+VALID_CODE -> protocol_violation_auto_accept 반환을 허용하도록 failure_code 집합 확장. 두 분기 모두 BLOCKED이며 TC-2의 의도(packet 댓글만으로는 승인 불가)는 그대로 검증됨.

dev_handover.test_results:
============================= test session starts ============================= platform win32 -- Python 3.12.9, pytest-9.0.3, pluggy-1.6.0 collected 18 items
tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py::test_exact_match_pass PASSED [ 5%] tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py::test_packet_comment_only_fail PASSED [ 11%] tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py::test_stale_nonce_only_fail PASSED [ 16%] tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py::test_code_mismatch_only_fail PASSED [ 22%] tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py::test_mixed_comments_exact_match_wins_pass PASSED [ 27%] tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py::test_wrong_author_correct_code_fail PASSED [ 33%] tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py::test_consumed_state_idempotent_pass PASSED [ 38%] tests/test_acceptance_provenance_2338.py::test_state_empty_json_fresh_nonce_pass PASSED [ 44%] tests/test_acceptance_provenance_2338.py::test_state_stale_nonce_file_fresh PASSED [ 50%] tests/test_acceptance_provenance_2338.py::test_allowed_approver_correct_code PASSED [ 55%] tests/test_acceptance_provenance_2338.py::test_wrong_nonce_blocked PASSED [ 61%] tests/test_acceptance_provenance_2338.py::test_wrong_approver_evidence_blocked PASSED [ 66%] tests/test_acceptance_provenance_2338.py::test_packet_sha256_matches_after_generation PASSED [ 72%] tests/e2e/test_pr_comment_approval_83f4.py::test_createdAt_field_only PASSED [ 77%] tests/e2e/test_pr_comment_approval_83f4.py::test_timestamp_missing_fail_closed PASSED [ 83%] tests/e2e/test_pr_comment_approval_83f4.py::test_timestamp_parse_error_fail_closed PASSED [ 88%] tests/e2e/test_pr_comment_approval_83f4.py::test_edge_pr_comment_too_old PASSED [ 94%] tests/e2e/test_pr_comment_approval_83f4.py::test_created_at_rest_field_pass PASSED [100%]
============================= 18 passed in 0.32s ==============================

handover.notes: 단일 단언 수정. 전체 회귀 18 GREEN. git diff 소스 변경은 tests/test_pr_approver_b96c.py 단일 파일이며, pipeline_state.json은 pipeline.py 게이트 실행으로 갱신된 상태 파일(소스 산출물 아님).
